# Proposed Documentation Structure

This file captures the proposed Docusaurus documentation structure for the Hyejoo bot documentation site.

## Top-level sections

- Getting Started with Hyejoo
  - Interacting with the bot
  - Balance & Currencies
  - Advanced Info
    - Optional Command Parameter Library
- Cards and Collection
  - Card overview
  - Card collection guide
    - Normal Cards (1*-4*) 
    - Legendaries (5*)
    - Fragments
    - Special
    - Promos
    - Limited & Birthdays
    - Liveauctions
    - Misc
  - Card management commands
    - /cards and its optional params
    - info
    - summon
    - has
    - wish list, wish add, wish remove
    - diff for/ diff from
    - eval
    - mark
    - rate
    - lock
- Clouts and Progression
  - Daily claims
  - Clouts
    - Train
    - Ascend
    - Level Claim
    - draw
    - collection progress
    - collection reset
    - legroll and getting legendary cards
  - Quests and achievements
- Effects and Store
  - Store and economy (explain store commands)
  - Active and Passive effect list and explanations (table active and passive effects, their descriptions etc)
  - guild plots, lemons and items to be pruchased by lemons
    - (Explain everything about plots, and every command)
- Events and Activities
  - Seasonal events
    - (Look through a promo collections, eg spring25, halloween20, etc, and list out all of them as events)
  - Limited-time activities
    - (1 star promo events, where 1 start promos eg ivesserafim are dropped randomly in claims without using a boostid, anniversary event, where hyejooanniv recipe item is added to the store to claim a promo card)
  - Community events
    - (Games, giveaways, community interaction)
- Ko-Fi Support
  - How to support
  - Rewards and benefits
  - FAQ
- Landing / Overview
  - What the bot does
  - Feature highlights
  - Quick links

## Suggested folder layout

- docs/
  - landing.mdx
  - getting-started/
  - cards-info/
  - daily-to-do/
  - effects-store/
  - events-activities/
  - clouting/
  - quests-achievements/
  - kofi-support/
